zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Maria Lueblein於1655年1月6日出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫瓦薩特盧丁根阿爾騰特盧丁根時，她的父親Leonhard Hans Lüblein48歲，母親Anna Körner32歲。她於1675年10月31日與Has Casper Sorg在德國結婚。她去世於1722年11月28日在她的家鄉享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

nameMeanings.name: Maria
meanings: A name derived from Mapia, one of the Greek forms of Miriam. Maria is found as a male name as well as a female name. Viscount Montague, of Cowdray, Sussex, who succeeded to the title as second viscount, was christened Anthony Maria Browne. In Camden's Remains (p. 44), referred to in Delicie Literarise, occurs Thomas Maria Wingfield; and there was also a Sir Edward Maria Wingfield. The name appears to have been adopted in the latter family from Mary, daughter of Henry VIII. Compare Notes and Queries 5th S. ii. 73, 316, 478. Marie is frequently found as a male name in France and in other parts of the Continent.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Maria Lueblein was born on 6 January 1655, in Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Leonhard Hans Lüblein, was 48 and her mother, Anna Körner, was 32. She married Has Casper Sorg on 31 October 1675, in Germany. She died on 28 November 1722, in her hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Maria Lueblein est née le 6 janvier 1655, à Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Leonhard Hans Lüblein, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Anna Körner, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Has Casper Sorg le 31 octobre 1675, à Allemagne. Elle est décédée le 28 novembre 1722, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Maria Lueblein am 6. Januar 1655 in Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Leonhard Hans Lüblein 48 und ihre Mutter Anna Körner 32. Sie hat am 31. Oktober 1675 in Deutschland Has Casper Sorg geheiratet. Sie starb am 28. November 1722 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.
